title: Definitive Cross-Dataset JRN Evaluation: Consolidated Meta-Analysis of 12 Experiments
summary: Demo notebook for the Definitive Cross-Dataset JRN Evaluation, which consolidates 12 experiments into a meta-analysis with 7 analyses: Fisher z random-effects probe validity (pooled rho=0.95), architecture comparison win rates, multiplicative compounding (MLP R²=0.83 vs GBM R²=-17.9), FK-shuffling decomposition (Cohen's d=0.69), training-free proxy summary, hypothesis scorecard (2 supported, 1 partial, 2 unsupported, 1 contradictory), and paper contribution reformulation. Uses 44 pre-computed examples and 25 aggregate metrics. Includes 4-panel visualization of key results.
